column9: [US] Austin TX on-site (relocation from Kent OH); Roamly Labs = Outdoorsy Group incubation arm; production agentic systems for embedded insurance + autonomous mobility + FSD telemetry; strong agentic match (conductor-subagent 42% token cut) + end-to-end shipping (MangaLens); domain gap (insurance/automotive) + comp not disclosed; F-1 OPT US-eligible, open to relocate
